:::{#def-expectation-matrix}

#### Expectation of a random matrix

For a random matrix $\matr{A}$ of size $m \times n$
with $(i,j)$-th element $A_{ij}$,
the **expectation** $\Expp\matr{A}$ is the $m \times n$ matrix
whose $(i,j)$-th element is $\E{A_{ij}}$:

$$
\Expp\matr{A} \eqdef \pmat{
  \E{A_{11}} & \E{A_{12}} & \cdots & \E{A_{1n}} \\
  \E{A_{21}} & \E{A_{22}} & \cdots & \E{A_{2n}} \\
  \vdots     & \vdots     & \ddots & \vdots     \\
  \E{A_{m1}} & \E{A_{m2}} & \cdots & \E{A_{mn}}
}
$$

In other words, expectation is applied **element-wise** to a random matrix.

:::
